loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing derived availability and run-hour proxies — specific runtime counts, service intervals, and startup durations are not measured by this meter's electrical columns.

loop1.title: Runtime & Duty
loop1.note: Showing total active power and load factor — run-hours and start counts are not directly measured by this meter, so windowEnergyKwh is used as a proxy for operational intensity.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing total apparent energy and power factor — MTBF/MTTR (duration) are not measured for this asset.
